offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient manual reconciliation causes late payments. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient manual reconciliation of invoices and payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for discrepancies on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
